title: Enchanted Cards
description: Replaces the textures of enchanted books to TCG style cards
body:
# **Enchanted Cards**

### **ABOUT**
Changes the textures of enchanted books to TCG-style enchanted cards. Not only is it easier to know the enchanted book by just looking at it, the pack also gives the satisfaction of collecting cards and displaying them. Moreover, the textures pair nicely with the new shelf blocks for decoration or enchanted book shop purposes

The card textures vary in color depending on which items they enchant:
- cyan -> armor enchantments
- red -> sword enchantments
- green -> special enchantments
- brown -> bow and crossbow enchantments
- purple -> mace enchantments
- blue -> trident enchantments
- orange -> fishing rod enchantments
- gray -> curses

The enchantment level is indicated by the number of gold bars at the bottom of the cards.

![Enchanted Cards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/063172b5ff2545390fcee806bb73e71eb6437f76.png)

### **COMPATIBILITY**
Works in versions 1.21.5+
Texture size: 64x

_*note: if you want more flawless glint on the cards, you can use glint resource packs that are greater than 64x_

### **SUPPORT ME**
I have just started making textures and you can support me by downloading this and future uploads. Thank you and enjoy!
